entry.title: Re: Moving to S/4HANA Revenue Accounting & Reporting from SAP ERP 6.0
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for such a detailed blog, I have below two queries from it

1. What is mean by refactored migration program mentioned in OCM approach under point. 2? 

2. In case of Conversion / Brownfield implementation and Approach 2 with OCM, OIP is decided to use then how Simplification item Consistency check error will be fix in source ECC system as migration steps mentioned are to be carry in S/4HANA.

Appreciate your response.

entry.title: SSAM Android Client build fails (SSAM 2310 + MDK 23.8.7)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'm trying to create an SSAM 2310 Client for Android, and all the Android dependencies are fine. However, when I create the client using the 'create-client' command, I get an "Failed to run ns build android" with below error. Could anyone please provide some insights or suggestions to resolve this issue?

Thank you very much in advance,
Kingston. A

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning Data Action Advance Formula
entry.content:
Hi, you can try something like below

DATA([d/Measures] = "amount", [d/Cost Center] = "101", [d/GL] = "DIRECT") = (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Percentage", [d/Cost Center] = "101", [d/GL] = "A" )/100)*RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "amount", [d/Cost Center] = "101", [d/GL] = "A" )

This would take the measure amount as "2000" in the combination cost center "101' & GL "A" and multiple it by measure Percentage as "10" in the combination cost center "101" & GL "A" and store the value in the measure amount in the combination cost center "101" & GL "DIRECT".

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: I am from Ghana and currently living in Accra,Ghana.

entry.title: My BAS dev space remains in status "Starting"
entry.content:
My BAS dev space remains in status "Starting" for a long time, ID "ws-4rjd9"

It is not a free account, How do resolve this? Any inputs?

entry.title: Re: Single Inbound delivery with multiple containers
entry.content:
Hello @KihoKim 

Inbound delivery should be used to implement an inbound shipment that an vendor confirms to you. In other words it should reflect bill of lading. Inbound delivery describes what is being delivered, not how a shipment is packed. 

Handling unit object is used to implement packing details of an inbound delivery. 

Of course you can use HU identification 2 to store a container number. 

It looks like your project is facing time constraints, so HU implementation is being descoped and inbound deliveries will be used instead. That is a shortcut in my opinion that is going to backfire soon.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How to add custom field in request material mdg fiori app
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

Can you please help me in adding custom field in request material standard fiori app using custom field logic

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to use Product Allocation only with S1...
entry.content:
Hello @priya_sshekhar 

If the characteristics delivered in S140 then you can use S140 directly in your product allocation implementation. Otherwise I'd advise to create a custom info structure and customize production allocation around that. I don't think changing S140 is a good idea.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: My BAS dev space remains in status "Starting"
entry.content: After a long time it stopped, when i started again it worked, This is the first time i am facing this issue. I don't know how it got resolved. Thanks anyways

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content:
@YuchingLee 

The instance will be included in the universal push if the provisioning switch 'Company Settings > JDM v2.0/Skills Management' is checked under Provisioning.

Thanks,

Vicky

entry.title: Adding custom title for sub-section on List report page in CAP with NodeJS
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I have a requirement to change the title of a subsection based on condition. I have implemented below steps to achieve this, but labels are showing (unsupported- object type)

1. I have added "ReceiveTitleName" in the schema and mapped the ReceiveTitleName in the annotation file for the label of the subsection.

 

2. Then I am setting the value of the ReceiveTitleName  in the service JS file based on the condition and reading the value maintained in i18 properties. 

But on the UI its showing unsupported for the Subsection Title.

Please let me know if any additional information is required. 

Awaiting for solution!!Thanks!

Jeevan

entry.title: SAC Planning Advanced formula code clarification.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can someone please help me in understanding the below piece of code. 

 

DATA([d/Measures] = "ABC") 
	= RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "M1", [d/Version] = "VERSION1", [d/Date] = "202101", [d/DIM2] = "#")
	* (RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "M2", [d/Version] = "VERSION1", [d/Date] = "202101", [d/D3] = "#", [d/D4] = "#",[d/MATERIAL] = "#", [d/t.S:SAP_ALL_COSTCENTER] = "#", [d/CCACTIVITYTYPE] = "#", [d/FIXVARIABLE] = "#", [d/COMPQUANTITY_UNIT] = "#") * 0 + 1)

 

Here I am confused with the last piece of code * 0 + 1. Can someone please help me on this.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic calendar view in SAC
entry.content:
Hi @p2s we have an option to create a dynamic date filter in SAC, you could try creating a story filter like below 

For current date selection either the system date can be taken or you can create an input control, in the offset specify granularity(month, year etc.) and the look back and ahead time line also you can change the date hierarchy(top right). In the above example I have created an input control for the date and set it to Sep 2023(which will act as current date), the look back time to 3 years and look ahead to 4 years, the output be like

 

Here the user can specify the timeline and will be able to see data  belonging to that time period.

entry.title: Re: Why Is My Content Marked as Spam?

entry.title: Re: Your Essential Toolset for Planning & Migrating to SAP S/4HANA - 2024 Edition
entry.content: Another idea: the start of such a journey might be a good opportunity to refresh the teams and individuals knowledge about SAP Support and how to interact with the SAP support teams in the most efficient and effective manner - The Support Accreditation Program offers a great way to "update": https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/getting-started-with-support-from-sap-support-accreditation

entry.title: Re: Substitutions in SAP FI
entry.content: Hi, you have defined exit NS23 in YGRFXX595. But in your substitution ZFI_002 step 048 you are trying to use NS22. Try to use NS23 in step 048 🙂

entry.title: Re: Jazz up Your Hybrid User Management with the SCIM Extension for SAP Identity Management - SAP Be
entry.content:

I think this is good news, esp. where we don't have connectors in SAP IPS for a target system. Any chance this connector can be made available as a part of SAP IDM Business Extension Services.

What is the process if we want to get access to this connector? Thanks.

Regards,

Priyank

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 2 - Formulas
entry.content:
The formula I have come up with for part 1 is:

FORMAT_LOCALIZED_DECIMAL(SUM(MAP(SPLIT(STRING(MAP(data.A_SalesOrderItem1,STRING(item.NetAmount))), ","),NUMBER(item))),"en",2)

 

I'm sure there's an easier way to sum the 20 NetAmount values, but everything else I came up with ended with 0.

entry.title: Re: #CoE#JMTHYmigo自定义字段增强
entry.content:
Hi zenan,

Have you try this BAdI:

Des: Check Item Data in Material Document

Id: BADI_MMIM_CHECK_MATDOC_ITEM

It has material document header and item info as input parameter with message for output.

Br,

Hongbo

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Cloud ALM for Implementations - Book Released
entry.content: Hi @Jagmohan_Chawla, doesnt matter how many videos or expert blogs out there, I am also a huge fan of books. Congratulations once again for your work. 🙂 My question is do you think the book will be always stay up-to-date, does it still make sense to buy it in 2024?

entry.title: Re: The two project control possibilities in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Enterprise projects and professional
entry.content:
@mollamekonnen 

Enterprise projects can be used for different scenarios. Scope item 1NT describes the common part for most of these scenarios with regards to project financials. Scope item 35F extends that for so called capital intensive or capex projects. The objective of such projects could be to develop or extend one or multiple assets for a company. Hence from a project financial point of view the management of corresponding assets under construction and final assets, including a structured settlement of project related costs to them, is a key capability which is described in scope item 35F.

entry.title: Re: #CoE#JMTHYmigo自定义字段增强
entry.content: 你好王老师，输出输出参数中没有自定义字段信息，是要通过什么条件取哪张底表或者数据源，自定义字段也启用了相关数据源，但是在自定义CDS视图中查询不到相关的数据源

entry.title: Re: Customer Engagement apps / roles within SAP S/4 Utilites
entry.content:
Hi,

The solution "SAP S/4HANA Utilities for Customer Engagement" is not a Fiori App but a WebUI based complete solution which offers customer service and commodity sales capabilities for the Utilities Industry.
More information can be found here:
• User Assistance
• Cookbooks and Guidelines - Part "SAP S/4HANA Utilities for Customer Engagement".
There are also several blogs available, explaining what's in in this solution, like:
S/4HANA Utilities for Customer Management (S4CRM) – redesigned sales contract management for utilities

Best regards,
Katrin
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Self-service procurement: how far can you go in decentralizing your purchasing?
entry.content:
Hi Experts 

In the Delivery address tab  -  how to default country/region key. 

for every instance this field is recurring to update in the app.

for example for USA -  default it to US 

Appreciate your insight to this 

 

Thank you 

Raj

entry.title: MEMBERSET for current month in [d/Date] dimension with daily granularity
entry.content:
Hi,

I´m using a planning model with time dimension on daily granularity.
In a data action I want to read the Actual data for the last 3 full months and create Projection data for the current month.

Currently my data action has 4 parameters to define those time ranges.

The corresponding two MEMBERSET functions look like this:

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %ProjectionMonthStart% TO %ProjectionMonthEnd%
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = %ActualsLast3MStart% TO %ActualsLast3MEnd%

The same could be achieved by using 4 attributes in the version dimension.

Both solutions must be maintained manually month by month.

Now I´m looking for a dynamic solution based on the current date, but it seems SAC is not able to provide this.
Remind, the planning model is on daily granularity!

Let´s look on the time range for current month
I can´t find a any function from the set of date functions (TODAY, PREVIOUS, NEXT, FIRST, LAST) to define the 1st and the last day of the current month.

The same is with last 3 months Actuals.

The requirement is easy to solve if the time granularity of the date dimension is month.
But with daily granularity it seems to be impossible.

Has anybody an idea how to solve it or is SAC not capable to make it run?

BR
Thomas

entry.title: Re: Single Sign On to SAP Cloud Integration (CPI runtime) from an external Identity Provider
entry.content: Thank you for sharing @vinayak_adkoli! I am curious what scenarios require a people-based interactive authentication flow for CPI. Shouldn't this be solved on app layer rather than the iflow? SAP Principal Propagation would then be achieved through token exchange on CPI level.

entry.title: Re: How to make different colour for editable KPIs
entry.content:
Hi @Vasu_Sac am not sure what exactly you were looking for, if you need to color a measure in your table, you could just select the cell and apply a fill color, like below

Same way you could select all the cells for sale_input and apply to them also or you can try reading up on styling rules which helps to style your table with more control, please read through the below blog

How to use styling rules in your table widget & notes on performance - SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content:
Hello, I have this flow.

I am receiving the following XML from an RFC Function Module.

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?>
<rfc:Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response xmlns:rfc="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
	<ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE>
		<item>
			<CUSTOMER>0001000011</CUSTOMER>
			<CUSTOMER_NAME>ELIAS KEKAKOS</CUSTOMER_NAME>
			<CURRENCY>EUR</CURRENCY>
			<BALANCE>39640.8200</BALANCE>
			<MESSAGE/>
		</item>
	</ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE>
	<E_BALANCE>39640.8200</E_BALANCE>
	<E_CURRENCY>EUR</E_CURRENCY>
	<E_CUSTNAME>ELIAS KEKAKOS</E_CUSTNAME>
	<E_CUSTOMER>0001000011</E_CUSTOMER>
	<E_RETURN_MESSAGE/>
</rfc:Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response>

 

and the JSON is the below

 

{
    "Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response": {
        "ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE": {
            "item": {
                "CUSTOMER": "0001000011",
                "CUSTOMER_NAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS",
                "CURRENCY": "EUR",
                "BALANCE": "39640.8200",
                "MESSAGE": ""
            }
        },
        "E_BALANCE": "39640.8200",
        "E_CURRENCY": "EUR",
        "E_CUSTNAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS",
        "E_CUSTOMER": "0001000011",
        "E_RETURN_MESSAGE": ""
    }
}

 

I want the Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response/ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE/item to permanently table even if it has 1 record or more. I enabled the Streaming option with the above XML element, but not only the JSON with 1 record in ITEM did not change, but when I have more than 1 it still is not table [ ] as you can see below.

 

{
    "Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response": {
        "ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE": {
            "item": {
                "CUSTOMER": "0001000022",
                "CUSTOMER_NAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS",
                "CURRENCY": "EUR",
                "BALANCE": "238.6900",
                "MESSAGE": ""
            },
            "item": {
                "CUSTOMER": "0001000035",
                "CUSTOMER_NAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS2",
                "CURRENCY": "EUR",
                "BALANCE": "20639.1000",
                "MESSAGE": ""
            }
      },
        "E_BALANCE": "0.0000",
        "E_CURRENCY": "",
        "E_CUSTNAME": "",
        "E_CUSTOMER": "",
        "E_RETURN_MESSAGE": ""
    }
}

 

What I am expecting is the below

{
    "Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response": {
        "ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE": {
            "item": [
                {
                    "CUSTOMER": "0001000035",
                    "CUSTOMER_NAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS",
                    "CURRENCY": "EUR",
                    "BALANCE": "20639.1000",
                    "MESSAGE": ""
                },
                {
                    "CUSTOMER": "0001000041",
                    "CUSTOMER_NAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS2",
                    "CURRENCY": "EUR",
                    "BALANCE": "1610.1900",
                    "MESSAGE": ""
                }
            ]
        },
        "E_BALANCE": "0.0000",
        "E_CURRENCY": "",
        "E_CUSTNAME": "",
        "E_CUSTOMER": "",
        "E_RETURN_MESSAGE": ""
    }
}

or with 1 record under the ITEM

{
    "Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response": {
        "ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE": {
            "item": [
                {
                    "CUSTOMER": "0001000035",
                    "CUSTOMER_NAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS",
                    "CURRENCY": "EUR",
                    "BALANCE": "20639.1000",
                    "MESSAGE": ""
                }
            ]
        },
        "E_BALANCE": "20639.1000",
        "E_CURRENCY": "EUR",
        "E_CUSTNAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS",
        "E_CUSTOMER": "0001000035",
        "E_RETURN_MESSAGE": ""
    }
}

As it does if I select ALL(under Streaming) but it is for every element.

Can someone tell me what is wrong?

Thanks

Elias

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0

entry.title: Re: Error 403 when calling Process Automation API on deployed SAP Build App
entry.content:
The header you have marked "Authorization: Bearer undefined" is fine. The token is filled by the router to which this request is send. What is the path of the request? It should end in "workflow/rest/v1/workflow-instances". From the name (on the left), it appears to be wrong. It is fine if you have configured the destination with a url including this path. 

Check the payload/response. Sometimes it has some more information.

entry.title: Re: Not yet received SAP digital certification badge mail
entry.content:
Hey,

I have cleared the SAP certification exam thr81 on 9th April 2024. However have not yet received my digital badge mail. What should i do? Please help me.

entry.title: Re: Where can I find learning on the Termination Workbench
entry.content:
Hello Katja,

I am not to deep into this topic, but I guess you could find some answers around this link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/56bd4d7c05534d509bc25c8b3ecf24e7/b33ae153038a424de10000000a174cb4.html

Albert

entry.title: Re: Single Sign On to SAP Cloud Integration (CPI runtime) from an external Identity Provider
entry.content: @Martin-Pankraz One of the use cases for this approach to define the scope of data to be displayed when calling iFlow. Based on user's context you can restrict the data to be displayed by leveraging his backend business role/current access.

entry.title: GHG Recording don't work - Sustainability Control Tower
entry.content:

After I have created an activity type and activities, I cannot create emissions on those activities.
I have data loaded for all months of 2023. However, I get an error message on "Collect Emission Data" when I select any period. Why?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Not yet received SAP digital certification badge mail
entry.content:
Hello,

You can contact SAP through Mail-training.india@sap.com ,so they can help you.

Thanks

Subbareddy

entry.title: Re: Automatic payments
entry.content:
Hey there,

Your customer's request for a different payment program visualization focusing on business partners and displaying all line items together is possible through configuration settings. You can customize layout variants and adjust selection criteria to meet their needs. For detailed guidance, consider consulting SAP documentation or reaching out to SAP support.

entry.title: Number display setting
entry.content:
Hello How can I define that a number pattern will not show zeros after the number
For example, will appear in the MMBE inventory 500 and not 500.000
 
Thank

entry.title: Re: How to determine with scripting whether a member is a...
entry.content:
Hi edgar, many thanks for your answer. Forgot to mention that I´m using a SAC planning model. No exclamation mark in this case.

The "&" in SAC doesn´t do the same thing.

t.S:SAP_ALL_COSTCENTER: "[t.S:SAP_ALL_COSTCENTER].[parentId].&[1234]"

In case the member is part of a hierarchy I get the & character. Using flat presentation for the dimension the & is not returned.

BR Thomas

entry.title: Re: Migration Assessment result is SMALL but no template...
entry.content: Hello Ron,

entry.title: Re: Error while Creating Returns ZRE: Incompletion Log
entry.content:
Hi Chirag, 

Can you check the material master for CFOP code and try to check where the other fields are maintained in master data?

Apart from this, please also try to check whether the tax code is maintained in all tax conditions determined in the sales order.

entry.title: Re: Extract Data from File fetched from UI
entry.content:
Hi Laxmi,

the next task has its own job ID - every task has its own job ID. You can store your information in the audit variables, also called context variables, which live exactly as long as your process runs.

uSetContextVar, uGetContextVar are the 2 functions you can check out for that.

Cheers

 Norman

entry.title: Re: Migration Assessment result is SMALL but no template...
entry.content:
Hello Ron,

our approach is to support the migration of any scenario, but our goal is not to 100% migrate scenarios. As there are many use cases which still require manual interaction. With probably mid of the year we plan to release the new version of the migration tool. The focus here is to always offer a pattern for migration. Furthermore, the migration tool should not stop on an error and migrate the supported features, which allows to continue afterwards on enhancing the produced output and not starting from scratch. You can still raise a ticket if some features are not working, but you won't be blocked from continuing. The summary after migration should show the details of what steps were skipped.

entry.title: Re: How to determine with scripting whether a member is a...
entry.content: Hi ThomasK, what if you create an array with all hierarchy node IDs or names and check with your_array(indexOf(yourSelection) if your current selection is in the list i.e. an hierarchy leaf? Not an elegant way but should work until someone posts a better way. br edgar

Could you please help us know which customer raised this request about Succession Planning Health Check? We would like to collect further feedback and validate the use case value. 

Thank you!

BR,

Beibei

entry.title: Re: New Phase Model for the Maintenance Processes in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Everyone ,

Is there any way that we can integrate the SAM app with our 9 phase model, means once you assign the operation from assign operation FIORI app  and technician confirm the operation from SAM and complete it ,so  by any chance OMWC (order main work completed ) status hit on header level and it  will move to next  phase which is post execution .

any leads on this will be helpful.

Thanks:

Prashant

entry.title: The cost is booked by using KB15N with Qty and setteled but Qty is not showing
entry.content:
HI all.

the cost is booked in an internal order through cost element using tcode KB15N with quantity. Cost element is active with qty tick. when we booked the cost the quantity is showing correctly but when we settele the internal order and transffered the cost using tcode ko88, the cost is shifted but quantity is not showing. the quantity is KWH and we are trying to transffered electricty.

but other cost elements are working ok. like diesel , petrol etc.

 

BR

Qaiser

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 2 - Formulas
entry.content:
My formula is similar but I convert NetAmount to a NUMBER inside the MAP function...

 

"$" + FORMAT_LOCALIZED_DECIMAL(SUM(MAP(data.A_SalesOrderItem1,NUMBER(item.NetAmount))), "en", 2)

 

and for the chart I have the following:

 

MAP(SLICE(data.A_SalesOrderItem1, 0, 5), {x: item.Material, y: NUMBER(item.NetAmount)})

entry.title: Re: Mass Change Email Recipient for Jobs
entry.content:
Hello,

this is a task to be done individually for each job. Depending on the amount you could think about an ABAP program to ease your work (but of course this is to be done carefully and error free 😉 ). The table containing this information is TBTCCNTXT.

Kind regards

Jan

entry.title: Re: How to determine with scripting whether a member is a...
entry.content: Hi edgar, & is unfortunatley not the solution (see edited post before). The solution to read all dimension members is currently the only way to solve it. The problem with it is, that I have to read 150.000 products and have to loop trough them. This takes a while just to only identify if the selected cell was a node or a leaf. Seems the API could be enhanced. BR Thomas

entry.title: Re: Sales in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition – Automated Order Process with SAP´s Intelligent Tech
entry.content:
Hi ,

Is there any process to create bulk sales order for OTC one time customer .

Thanks

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 2 - Formulas
entry.content: Took a middle ground between those, MAPping data.A_SalesOrderItem1 to { "NetAmount" : NUMBER( ) } and then SUM_BY_KEY( .... "NetAmount"). Didn't think to look at SUM...

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content: It is difficult to understand what your problem is. In my opinion the JSON is correct. There is an item table.

entry.title: Re: Unable to load metadata of fiori apps in WebIDE.
entry.content:
You will need to find out, where exactly this SSLHandshakeException is happening, and then updating the expired certificate with a fresh one. There are several SSL connections involved here:

  1. The connection from your browser to this webidetesting app. (But I think, if something were wrong with this connection, we would see an error message directly from the browser, and not an html page containing this Java error message?!)
  2. So more likely, the connection to the app is working fine, and the app is then running into an error and returning this simple error message response to the browser. In this case, the problem could be the connection between the webidetesting app and the SCC. The SCC is using a special certificate to secure the connection to the SAP Cloud VM. You can update this certificate in the SCC admin UI as described here:
    Update the Certificate for a Subaccount | SAP Help Portal
  3. Or the problem could also be the connection from the SCC to your backend system. Here there are two certificates involved, which are mutually validated:
    1. the SCC's "System Certificate", which the backend system validates as a client certificate
      (The expiration date of this certificate can be checked in the SCC admin UI under "Configuration --> ON-PREMISE --> System Certificate".)
    2. the backend system's server certificate, which the SCC validates during the handshake.
      (This certificate can be checked in the backend system, transaction STRUST --> SSL server Standard.)

You should also check the relevant log files (the logs of your webidetesting app, the SCC logs and the ICM trace on backend side) to find out, where exactly an expired certificate is involved here.

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning Advanced formula code clarification.
entry.content:
Hi, the general structure of the statement is

DATA([d/Measures] = "ABC")
= RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "M1")
* RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "M2")

This results in an inner-join that the measure ABC is calculated only in the case where values for M1 and M2 are existing.

The technique using 

(RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "M2") * 0 + 1)

is a common workaround to set all values where M2 is existing to 1. The multiplication is now M1 * 1 (where M2 exists). This results finally in keeping only M1 values where M2 exists, by using the inner-join behavior explained above. 

BR Thomas

(Thanks for Kudos)

entry.title: SAC: Not equal to sign in Data Action script?
entry.content:
Hello there,

in the example, i want to specify that all customers are in consideration. So i want NOT EQUAL to #. Any idea how can i implement it in SAC? Its subset of Javascript so i assume the syntax should have worked

entry.title: 固定资产-变更（异步）错误HTTP Code: 403 ( Forbidden )
entry.content: 我尝试通过Soap UI应用调用固定资产-变更（异步）的API接口，去更新固定资产评估折旧中的“报废价值”字段的数据，请求代码已验证通过，通信用户和密码也确认无误，但是执行更改时，返回了“HTTP Code： 403 （ Forbidden ）”的错误，我无法确定具体错误，附件中是我的请求代码。

entry.title: Advanced Intercompany Sales(5D2) - IC Supplier Invoice not created but no error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm testing Advanced Intercompany Sales in S/4HANA 2023 and have done all the settings as Advanced Intercompany Sales (5D2) .

 
All the other processes are done successfully, but the supplier invoice is not auto created after Intercompany billing is created. No error message in the message log, and no "reprocess" or "process" can be pressed.

 

 

 

 


I've checked
1. Note 3325233 - Advanced Intercompany Sales: Wrong check for intercompany supplier invoice
2. Note 3326194 - (Advanced Intercompany Sales) Support of Company-Specific Supplier Numbers
3. Blog - Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer failed to create Supplier Invoice
but those are not my case.

Could anyone suggest how to process this supplier invoice?

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,
SH

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 2 - Formulas
entry.content:
I assume that, if the Sales Orders weren't ordered already, you'd have to put in an ORDER(data.A_SalesOrderItem1,item.NetAmount) like this : 

MAP(SLICE(ORDER(data.A_SalesOrderItem1,item.NetAmount), 0, 5), {x: item.Material, y: NUMBER(item.NetAmount)})

Did I understand correctly?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Welcome @JessyMonrose - are you interested to "join" the Paris group? @walid and others post about great local events.

entry.title: Re: French Character transfer issue in the file to Partne...
entry.content:
Hi Sekhar-San,

in a Unicode system when using default encoding the files are created based on UTF-8.

Hence I assume your partner is expecting Non-Unicode (Latin-1)?

You can adapt the ENCODING option to NON-UNICODE, but then the file encoding will depend on  the current ABAP linguistic environment (e.g. the logon language).

For details see e.g. SAP note 1322715 > Attachment  Requirements_of_ABAP_Programs_in_Unicode_Systems.pdf

Chapter 5.8

Best regards,

Nils Buerckel

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Welcome @Nurudin_Lartey - it's great to have someone join our SAP Community from Ghana! Which SAP topics are you interested in? Let us know if you need any help to get started!

entry.title: Re: Count Top Skip are not supported in Odata Query of RA...
entry.content: Hi, Siva, As communicated in Email, you code should be S/4 HANA , not in BTP ABAP Environment. And it should be a BTP Abap environme BUG . Best regards! Jacky Liu

entry.title: Re: production orders at work center using cois_select_or...
entry.content: Well, you asked about production orders which is why I suggested IV_PROD_ORDER_SEL = 'X'. You've now mentioned IV_PLANNED_ORDER_SEL= X which is for selecting planned orders instead. Planned orders technically don't have a workcenter. So, unless you are dispatching planned orders on the capacity planning board or unless you are in a REM environment, you will not succeed.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 2 - Formulas
entry.content:
8951c01475e11947e1522979a20e2ad4fca61c9ec1891b3868c6edcfcc93b908

I initially used a GENERATE_RANGE to map the NetAmount, wasn't sure how to dynamically handle them. The code from @ajmaradiaga though is the better approach for handling general cases

entry.title: SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI Now Supports Custom Certificate Authorities on AWS
entry.content:
The SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI solution provides your SAP GUI users with simple and secure access to their ABAP-based business applications. In March 2024, we released the long-awaited Custom Certificate Authority (CA) feature. You can now integrate your own Public Key Infrastructure (PKI) by connecting to a private CA hosted on Amazon Web Services (AWS).

With the SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI, you can provide end users of SAP GUI with X.509 certificates that enable single sign-on (SSO) to ABAP-based business applications. After successful authentication, the SAP Secure Login Service provisions a short-lived X.509 certificate to the Secure Login Client on the end-user desktop. This certificate is then used for SSO to the ABAP systems. In the initial scope of the solution, the SAP-managed Cloud CA was used to sign these end user certificates.

What’s new?

With the newly released feature you now have the option to integrate your own PKI by connecting your cloud-based private CA running on Amazon Web Services (AWS) to the SAP Secure Login Service. After successful authentication of the end user, your private CA issues an X.509 certificate. And the SAP Secure Login Service then returns this X.509 certificate to the Secure Login Client on the end user desktop.

How does it work?

By connecting your cloud-based private CA running on AWS, the X.509 certificates will be signed by your own customer-managed CA. The SAP Secure Login Service will just reuse your CA setup and provision the certificates to the Secure Login Client of the end users.

Configuration required for the token exchange, credentials for accessing AWS, and which AWS Private CA to be used can be configured in the administration console of SAP Secure Login Service (via the new tab “Custom CA”). This configuration is needed for secure token exchange and to ensure that only your SAP Secure Login Service subscription can be used to access your custom CA. And at the same time, that the certificates can only be used for SAP GUI SSO.

Of course, the certificates that are signed by your custom CA will look differently from the ones that are signed by the SAP Cloud Root CA. You can decide about the root, how many levels you want to have in there, and the names.

For configuration information, please refer to the documentation that is available on SAP Help Portal here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP%20SECURE%20LOGIN%20SERVICE/c35917ca71e941c5a97a11d2c55dcacd/32875689a8654e0bb3c8697fb6947940.html

What are the benefits?

For compliance reasons you might not be allowed to use the SAP-managed Cloud CA to sign the end user certificates but have to use a CA that is fully under your control. With the new feature you can now integrate with your custom CA running on AWS thereby having full control how the CA is set up. For example, the root of the CA, whether it is in the AWS CA or offline, and how the signed certificates will look like.

More information

For more information about our SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI solution and to stay up to date on the latest developments, visit our topic page in SAP Community:

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/single-sign-on

entry.title: Is there a mandatory parameter document for the interface when calling DI API in Java
entry.content: Excuse me, currently I am using Java to call the DI API interface to operate on SBO. However, I often spend a lot of time troubleshooting parameters. Some parameters are mandatory and there seems to be no explanation in the document. Do any friends know where I should go to find some mandatory parameters for the interface? thanks

entry.title: Assignment removed after failure
entry.content:
Hello,

We do some manual Task List mandatory assignments that users need to complete. They should have one single chance to go through it.

Is there any way to get the item assignment removed from their learning plan if they are marked as "Failed"? I know online content can be blocked after failing, but I´m not able to find a similar functionality on other item types.

Thanks in advance for your input!

Olga

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content: See again the question because I added what I am expecting. If the records are more than 1 under the element ITEM this is what it returns in JSON.

entry.title: Need CDS for supplier invoice for report development
entry.content:
Please share the CDS Name for supplier invoice item for report development.

Kindly share the list of CDs name based on supplier invoice item level.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need CDS for supplier invoice for report development
entry.content:
Could you please refer to this online documentation which contains all released CDS view for supplier invoice:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/01d53e3c4cde4dcd8e26f9cba21ad35c.html?locale=en-US

Here you can find some CDS views, for example I_SuplrInvcItemPurOrdRefAPI01 and I_SuplrInvoiceItemGLAcctAPI01 to get information about supplier invoice items that are posted with reference to purchase order or directly posted to G/L accounts.

entry.title: How can I retrieve specific Sybase Open Client version EBF29893 ?
entry.content:
Hi,

Using a thirdparty software, which use Sybase.

We are requesting to use Open Client EBF29893.

We tried using the latest version provided by SAP EBF30634 but it seems to crash the system.

Any chance we can retrieve EBF29893?
Sincerely,

Fabrice Plard

entry.title: Question regarding Class and Sub Class Constructor
entry.content:
Hello!

Me and my colleagues have been studying for the SAP Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud Certification and we have come across a question where we need some discussion regarding the right answers:

Class super has subclass sub. Which rules are valid for the sub constructor? (2 correct)

1. The method signature can be changed.
2. Events of your own instance cannot be raised before the registration of a handler in super.
3. Import parameters can only be evaluated after calling the constructor of super.
4. The constructor of super must be called before using any components of your own instance.

We know that 4. is true and 3. is wrong, but we are not sure about which one of the others is true. We have read several SAP sources and we need some input from the community.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Sample to use BAPI_MATVAL_DEBIT_CREDIT
entry.content: MATERIAL_DEBIT_CREDIT-CURR_TYPE is required

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON convert streaming not working
entry.content: See again the question because I added what I am expecting. If the records are more than 1 under the element ITEM this is what it returns in JSON.

entry.title: Re: (LMS) disable the new Learning experience
entry.content: Hi Karen,

entry.title: Re: (LMS) disable the new Learning experience
entry.content: Hi Karen, is there any update on this topic?

entry.title: Re: How to bypass HU Type check during Replenishment
entry.content:
Hi, 

if the HU type of your Pick HU created by pack profile in the WOCR is always the same for all movements to the RACK you can bypass the HU Type Check during WT creation by maintaining a mapping of HU Type = BLANK to the respective bin types. 

However, the system will check again once HU type is known and if it is not allowed on the previously determined bin you will get an error.

If you meanwhile found a solution I would be eager to know how you solved it seeing that we have a similar issue and are facing issues during WT confirmation in RF in case the picked HU type is not allowed.

Thanks and best regards,

Stephan

entry.title: Join and innovate with the SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council (ESAC) Program
entry.content:
co-author: Bruno Cherqui

The SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council provides immense value by bringing together a select group of customers to collaborate with SAP experts and provide valuable insights and feedback on the development, improvement, and optimization of the SAP Enterprise Support program. Through this collaboration, members have the opportunity to influence SAP's support offerings, gain early access to new tools and resources, and actively shape the future direction of SAP's support solutions. 

The program is open to all SAP Enterprise Support customers at no additional cost (but limited capacity) and is covering all major SAP cloud solutions such as SAP S/4HANA, CX, BTP, SAP SuccessFactors HCM, ISBN, Cross Solutions topics.

New open workstreams for Q2:

  • Continuous Quality Check (CQC): Transformation Assessment for Sustainability
  • Continuous Quality Check (CQC): Transformation Assessment for SAP Integrated Business Planning
  • Continuous Quality Check (CQC): Deployment Readiness for SAP SuccessFactors HCM Suite EXPANSION
  • Expert-guided Implementation (EGI): SAP Datasphere Fundamentals (Data and Analytics)

Find an overview of all our workstreams running in Q2 here. 

To express interest, ask a question or join the program: contact us via esac@sap.com.

For more information you can also refer to our ESAC landing page on the SAP Support Portal.

Your SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council team

esac@sap.com
